column.name: file_document_uuid
column.remarks: The underlying agreement's file document uuid

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS underlying_agreement CASCADE;

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.comment: Add AccountId index in underlying agreement table

rollback.sql: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS underlying_agreement_accountId_idx CASCADE

column.name: activation_date
column.remarks: The date the underlying agreement was activated

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update underlying_agreement set data = jsonb_set(data, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', data -> 'sectorThroughputUnit') where data -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and data ->> 'sectorThroughputUnit' is not null;
update underlying_agreement set data = jsonb_set(data, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', data -> 'sectorThroughputUnit') where data -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and data ->> 'sectorThroughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update underlying_agreement set data = (data || jsonb_build_object('schemeDataMap', jsonb_build_object('CCA_2', jsonb_build_object('sectorMeasurementType', data -> 'sectorMeasurementType')))) - 'sectorMeasurementType';
update underlying_agreement set data = jsonb_set(data, '{schemeDataMap, CCA_2, sectorThroughputUnit}', data -> 'sectorThroughputUnit') - 'sectorThroughputUnit' where data ->> 'sectorThroughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.comment: Add CCA schema versions in data
changeSet.sql: UPDATE underlying_agreement SET data = jsonb_set(data, '{underlyingAgreement,facilities}', ( SELECT jsonb_agg( jsonb_set(element, '{facilityDetails}', element -> 'facilityDetails' || '{"participatingSchemeVersions": ["CCA_2"]}') ) FROM jsonb_array_elements(data -> 'underlyingAgreement'->'facilities') element ))

column.name: file_document_uuid
column.remarks: The underlying agreement's file document uuid

column.name: activation_date
column.remarks: The date the underlying agreement was activated

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS underlying_agreement_document CASCADE;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr

column.name: termination_letter_created_date
column.remarks: The date the termination letter is sent

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd
changeSet.sql: UPDATE underlying_agreement SET data = jsonb_set(data, '{underlyingAgreement,facilities}', ( SELECT jsonb_agg( CASE WHEN facility -> 'facilityDetails' -> 'facilityAddress' ->> 'country' NOT IN ('GB-ENG', 'GB-NIR', 'GB-SCT', 'GB-WLS') THEN jsonb_set(facility, '{facilityDetails,facilityAddress,country}', '"GB-ENG"') ELSE facility END) FROM jsonb_array_elements(data -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'facilities') AS facility)) WHERE data -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'facilities' IS NOT NULL;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE underlying_agreement_document RENAME COLUMN terminated_date TO termination_letter_created_date;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: UPDATE underlying_agreement_document unadoc SET terminated_date = atu.terminated_date FROM account_target_unit atu INNER JOIN underlying_agreement una ON atu.id = una.account_id WHERE atu.terminated_date IS NOT NULL AND una.id = unadoc.underlying_agreement_id;
